name: Apple Cheese Platz
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 450°F. Cream butter and sugar together thoroughly. Blend in flour until well combined. Press evenly onto the bottom and 1 1/2 inches up sides of an 8 1/2-inch springform pan. Spread jam evenly over the bottom of the crust. Beat all filling ingredients together with an electric mixer until smooth and light. Spread over the jam. Toss apples, sugar, and cinnamon together to coat well. Spoon over the filling. Sprinkle with almonds. Bake at 450°F for 10 minutes, then reduce heat to 400°F for 25-30 minutes or until set and apples are tender. Cool slightly and remove pan rim.
